title: HOLDEN TURMAN
text:
208-716-7221 | holden.turman1@gmail.com | LinkedIn | GitHub




Proficient: JavaScript, React
Intermediate: C#, Python, Express, Node.js, MySQL, Git
Basic: C, C++, Java
Other Skills: Project Management
Soft Skills: Communication, Teamwork, Problem Solving, Leadership, Adaptive Learner





B.S. Computer Science
Brigham Young University - Idaho | GPA: 3.33
December 2024 - May 2027 | Rexburg, Idaho

Area of Interest: Machine Learning/AI, Robotics
Applied software engineering best practices using JavaScript, React Native, Node.js, and PostgreSQL.
Gaining hands-on experience in software development, algorithms, and full-stack problem-solving using C, C#, Python, and C++.
Built and deployed responsive mobile-first applications in collaboration with senior developers.







Rexburg, Idaho | April 2025 - May 2025
* Engineered functional C++ drone flight system project within 4 hours, utilizing Generative AI to maximize learning efficiency with unfamiliar principles. * Engineered newly learned C++ concepts into a fully functional flight-logic prototype, demonstrating the ability to rapidly apply unfamiliar technologies to real-world engineering problems.



Thinkful Chegg Software Bootcamp | Remote | May 2021 - June 2021
* Engineered a full-stack reservation management system with RESTful APIs and database-driven CRUD operations, improving data reliability and streamlining user booking workflows. * Implemented React Router for seamless navigation and Express for efficient data handling. * Utilized Knex.js to optimize database queries and ensure smooth reservation workflows.



Thinkful Chegg Software Bootcamp | Remote | March 2021 - March 2021
* Designed and engineered an interactive flashcard application that enables users to create, edit, and organize study decks, significantly improving their ability to learn and review material efficiently. * Developed RESTful API endpoints and state management across multiple React components.







Harbor Freight | Rexburg, Idaho | May 2024 - Present
* Coordinated daily shipping and receiving, ensuring accurate inventory and timely stock replenishment. * Communicated with sales team to manage misplaced stock and organize products daily to enhance store navigation and increase customer footfall.
